disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute onset of diffuse crampy abdominal pain and frequent watery diarrhoea over the past ~18 hours, on a background of recurrent gut flares since a gastroenteritis episode 6 months ago
trigger_question_examples: What's been happening with your stomach?
When did this start and have you had it before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started last night with bloating and then turned into really bad cramps and watery diarrhoea. I've had flares like this since some bad food poisoning about six months ago, and they usually settle after a few days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and near-faint on standing, profound fatigue, dry mouth — features of fluid loss and mild volume depletion
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint, especially when you stand up?
How much have you been able to drink and keep down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, when I stand up I go really dizzy and feel like I might pass out, and my mouth is bone dry. I feel completely drained.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Even small sips of water provoke painful cramps, and an oral anti-diarrhoeal was vomited — poor tolerance of oral intake
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you try to drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I sip water the cramps kick off and I'm back in the toilet, and when I tried an anti-diarrhoea tablet I threw it straight up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the stool or vomit, no black tarry stool, still passing stool and wind, and the abdomen is not rock-hard or rigid to the patient
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood in your stool or vomit, or any black tarry stool?
Are you still passing wind and stool, and does your belly feel rock-hard?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood anywhere and nothing black — it's just watery. I'm still passing wind and going, and my belly is sore and bloated but not hard like a board.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really looked closely, but I don't think there's any blood.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or chills, no recent sick contacts or suspect food, and this episode mirrors previous non-infectious flares
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or sweats?
Anyone around you unwell, or anything unusual you ate?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or chills that I've noticed, and nobody around me is sick. It really feels the same as my other flare-ups, just worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is at risk of a fall from orthostatic dizziness while moving to and from the bathroom
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home right now?
Are you steady on your feet getting to the bathroom?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own at home. I'm worried I'll fall when I get up because I'm so dizzy.
